Class AbstractTermTransformer

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.JAbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractTermTransformer
All Implemented Interfaces:
TermTransformer, Sorted, Named, Operator, SortedOperator, Sorted, SyntaxElement, TerminalSyntaxElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
AddCast, ArrayBaseInstanceOf, ConstantValue, CreateBeforeLoopUpdate, CreateFrameCond, CreateHeapAnonUpdate, CreateLocalAnonUpdate, CreateWellformedCond, DivideLCRMonomials, DivideMonomials, EnumConstantValue, ExpandQueriesMetaConstruct, IntroAtPreDefsOp, MemberPVToField, MetaAdd, MetaArithBitMaskOp, MetaDiv, MetaEqual, MetaGeq, MetaGreater, MetaLeq, MetaLess, MetaMul, MetaPow, MetaShift, MetaSub, ObserverEqualityMetaConstruct
public abstract class AbstractTermTransformer extends JAbstractSortedOperator implements TermTransformer
Abstract class factoring out commonalities of typical term transformer implementations. The available singletons of term transformers are kept here.
